source_context.drive_smoke_recovered_text: Drive smoke test: enter after CHoCH confirmation and FVG retest. Stop loss below liquidity sweep wick.
source_context.vip_rtm_pdf: G:\My Drive\jobot\RTM-20220226T034955Z-001\VIP RTM MFF GROUP by KL.pdf
vip_rtm_key_context: Page 2 defines KL/FL/SRF/N3/SL and lists Sell setup with SRF, Buy setup with SRF, Sell setup without SRF.
Pages 3-5 define good KL as touch lower, touch upper, and close with base/engulf; page 4 gives sell/buy examples.
Page 11/13 contain SL-related remarks but not a complete numeric SL formula.
Page 12 references SRF XAUUSD Setup H1 @ 1910.

why_baseline: Small knowledge-brain EA scaffold already contains the CHoCH/FVG smoke rules as comments and is less entangled than large grid/jobbot EAs.

test_matrix.name: baseline_control
test_matrix.logic: Existing EA_KnowledgeBrain_v1 behavior or manual scaffold before adding new executable CHoCH/FVG/SRF conditions.

test_matrix.name: variant_a_choch_fvg_liquidity_sweep_sl
test_matrix.logic: Entry only after CHoCH confirmation and FVG retest; SL below liquidity sweep wick; no grid/martingale/no-SL behavior.

test_matrix.name: variant_b_optional_srf_kl
test_matrix.logic: After source-page review, add KL/SRF gate: KL has lower touch + upper touch + base/engulf; compare with/without SRF.

default_market_plan.timeframe: H1 for SRF/KL context; M15 optional only after H1 signal logic is stable
default_market_plan.date_range: Use same local data range as existing baseline artifact first; otherwise 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 for first manual MT5 pass.
default_market_plan.deposit: Use the account/deposit from the existing baseline report when available; otherwise record before run.

next_local_steps: Open EA_KnowledgeBrain_v1.mq5 and confirm it compiles before any behavior edits.
Create or manually code a tiny variant module only after user approval of this plan.
Run MT5 manual/local backtest for baseline_control, then variant_a, then optional variant_b.
Visualize resulting report with visualize_backtest.py and compare metrics.
